summary: iter240j — LinkedIn-style profile + Public/Private visibility tested. Backend 12/12 PASS. UI public profile renders correctly (visual confirmation via screenshot: headline, location, Send-message CTA, Bio card, Skills chips, Links card all visible on anonymous /profile/bob48c0). Owner-view + edit-modal flow could not be UI-tested end-to-end due to Math-captcha on login (Playwright didn't solve it) — but all data-testids are present in PublicProfilePage.jsx source (verified by grep).

minor.issue: experience/education/achievements come back as JSON-encoded strings (e.g. '[]') rather than arrays — asyncpg JSONB decoding quirk noted by E1. Frontend tolerated. Consider json.loads at serialization time for consistency.

minor.endpoint: Backend was unreachable on localhost:8001 at the start of testing (uvicorn was listening but not responding for ~minutes). A supervisorctl restart of backend resolved it. Worth checking for occasional event-loop blockage (LiteLLM calls visible in logs).

integration_issues.issue: Login form has a visual math captcha (e.g. '14 - 3 =') with no test bypass slot — automated E2E that needs an authenticated session can't proceed via the UI. Backend has JAPAP_E2E_BYPASS_2026 but frontend LoginPage doesn't appear to expose it through the form. Recommend a dev-only auto-fill or storage hint when REACT_APP_E2E=1.

feature_results.A_new_fields_exposed: PASS — anonymous GET returns all 15 new fields + profile_completion_pct + is_self + is_private
feature_results.B_lookup_by_username_or_user_id: PASS — both variants return same payload
feature_results.D_visibility_toggle_private_public: PASS — private masks bio/skills/wallet/etc, owner still sees full, public restores
feature_results.E_F_public_profile_sections_render: VISUAL PASS — screenshot shows headline, location, Send-message CTA, Bio card, Skills chips (python, react, tests), Links card (https://example.org). data-testids present in source.
feature_results.G_username_link_in_feed: NOT TESTED — could not log in via captcha; needs main agent self-test or dev captcha bypass.
feature_results.H_profile_linkedin_card_and_modal: NOT TESTED — same auth blocker. data-testids exist in source.
feature_results.K_rtl_arabic: NOT TESTED — but dir attribute IS wired in PublicProfilePage.jsx (dir={isRtl?'rtl':'ltr'} at line 91)
feature_results.L_email_never_leaked: PASS — owner view, other-user view, and anonymous view all confirmed no email key
feature_results.M_completion_pct_progression: PASS — pct increases monotonically as fields added

action_items: Add a captcha bypass for E2E tests on the LoginPage (frontend should accept ?e2e=1 or env-var to auto-fill JAPAP_E2E_BYPASS_2026 → captcha_answer=0), so Playwright can complete the auth-gated flows (G/H/I/J/K).
Consider json.loads on experience/education/achievements at GET-profile serialization so the FE never has to defensively parse a string.
Investigate occasional uvicorn unresponsiveness (likely async-blocking LiteLLM calls in some background path).
critical_code_review_comments: users.py routing OK: get_profile correctly swallows 401 to allow anon access; _strip_for_private_view drops 14 sensitive fields and forces is_private=true.
_compute_completion_pct is deterministic and capped at 100 — good.
JSONB fields stored as str via _json.dumps in PUT — but the read path does NOT json.loads them back. Frontend must be tolerant (E1 already aware).
Email is explicitly popped from response — good; verified by tests across 3 viewer-contexts.

success_rate.frontend: partial — public anonymous flow visually verified; owner-flow blocked by captcha

test_credentials: Bob: bob@japap.com / Test1234! (username bob48c0). Captcha bypass via JSON body: captcha_id=JAPAP_E2E_BYPASS_2026, captcha_answer=0. Login UI does NOT seem to surface this — used backend curl only.
seed_data_creation: Modified Bob's profile during PUT tests (headline='Test headline iter240j', bio='Bio test iter240j', skills=[python,react,tests], website_url=https://example.org, location='Yaoundé, CM'). Bob restored to profile_visibility=public at fixture teardown.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend fully green. For UI: anonymous /profile/bob48c0 confirmed to render PublicProfilePage with all sections. Owner-side UI (LinkedIn edit modal, visibility toggle, completion bar, UserNameLink navigation from feed) needs either (a) a frontend E2E captcha bypass, or (b) manual smoke by main agent. data-testids are all present in PublicProfilePage.jsx (verified by grep at lines 91, 126, 163, 171, 199, 213, 246). SW_VERSION verification not performed.
rca of the issue: N/A — no critical bug. Test gap is purely access-related (Playwright cannot solve the math captcha).
